title: cyclopogon casanaensis
intro: Cyclopogon casanaensis, also known as the Casana onion grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of orchid native to Central and South America, known for its medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Cyclopogon casanaensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves are sometimes used in herbal remedies for their health benefits.
